action_items.title: Review header resolution and quality flags
action_items.summary: Review header alias resolution, row normalization, and any quality flags before using the monitoring interpretation bundle.
action_items.rationale: Header alias resolution and quality flags were reviewed against the governed import-check context.

action_items.title: Review occurrence evidence context
action_items.summary: Confirm that governed occurrence-evidence records match the monitoring matrix, analyte, and interpretation scope.
action_items.rationale: Occurrence-evidence context was reviewed for monitored fish commodities and methylmercury interpretation.

action_items.title: Review analytical method context
action_items.summary: Confirm that governed analytical-method evidence remains appropriate for LOQ, recovery, storage, and uncertainty interpretation.
action_items.rationale: Analytical-method evidence was reviewed for LOQ, recovery, and measurement-uncertainty context.

action_items.title: Review linked focus records
action_items.summary: Work through linked review-focus records for high-attention foods and sensitive populations referenced by the monitoring check.
action_items.rationale: Linked review-focus records were reviewed for large predatory fish and sensitive populations.

action_items.title: Review analytical measurement ledger entry
action_items.summary: Row-level LOD coverage is incomplete. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

action_items.title: Review occurrence data ledger entry
action_items.summary: Lower-bound handling is governed by linked occurrence evidence. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

action_items.title: Review analytical method ledger entry
action_items.summary: Storage-stability interpretation relies on governed analytical-method context. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

action_items.title: Review sampling context ledger entry
action_items.summary: Sampling-plan interpretation relies on governed analytical-method context. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

action_items.title: Review governance links
action_items.summary: Confirm that source, method, legal, dataset, and reference-value links are sufficient for the intended monitoring review use.
action_items.rationale: Source, method, legal, dataset, and reference-value links were reviewed as governed monitoring context.

notes: Signoff packet is a reviewer-facing overlay on top of the contaminant monitoring interpretation bundle and does not change the underlying bundle content.
Waived actions remain explicitly visible so downstream reviewers can inspect accepted deviations from the default contaminant monitoring review sequence.
Signed-off status records closure of the governed review workflow only; it does not certify scientific correctness, submission readiness, or regulatory approval.
Attached legal-limit review snapshots remain visible in signoff so partial, anchor-only, or missing jurisdiction support cannot be mistaken for a complete legal-limit layer.
Illustrative reviewer packet for governed contaminant monitoring signoff.
